title: Planning Manager[Central/Construction/Maincon/construction site work and planning work]
description:
Roles & Responsibilities

  • Coordinate with the Costing, M&E, and Business Departments to fulfill all tender requirements efficiently.
  • Collaborate with Construction Department staff in planning, particularly in areas related to tender strategy and EHS (Environmental, Health & Safety) compliance.
  • Attend subcontractor and supplier workshop meetings related to tenders and ensure all necessary preparations are completed.
  • Ensure that proposed construction plans align with drawings, specifications, and relevant authority requirements.
  • Develop comprehensive construction schedules using Microsoft Project (or equivalent), reflecting accurate work sequences from project commencement to TOP (Temporary Occupation Permit).
  • Propose practical and alternative layouts for Temporary Site Facilities to optimize site operations.
  • Analyze and recommend efficient and authority-compliant construction sequences for structural and architectural works, in line with contract specifications.
  • Suggest suitable and cost-effective Earth Retaining or Stabilizing Structures (ERSS) for submission to the Costing Department.
  • Provide technical support to the Tender Team by addressing consultant queries and offering insights.
  • Estimate manpower and resource requirements for tender submissions, based on project scope and timelines.
  • Support the Project Team in refining and implementing proposed solutions post-tender award.
  • Review tender documents, drawings, and specifications to identify discrepancies, value engineering opportunities, and key areas for attention.
  • Participate in on-site safety inspections to assess safety standards and workmanship.
  • Proficient in Microsoft Office, Microsoft Project, and AutoCAD for planning and documentation purposes.
  • Review construction previews submitted by the Project Team and coordinate with them to obtain approval from Japan HQ.
  • Assist with enhancing EHS practices across sites by supporting office management initiatives for continual improvement.

postedCompany.description:
Linkedcorp is a professional recruitment firm specializing in providing comprehensive talent solutions. Our services range from general staffing, executive search, temporary & contract hiring, project hiring, and HR outsourcing services, ensuring that we are equipped to meet the diverse needs of organizations of all sizes. With a team of experienced and knowledgeable professionals, we are committed to delivering results that exceed expectations and help companies achieve their strategic goals.  


Our commitment to excellence and delivering value to our clients sets us apart in the industry. We are dedicated to building long-term partnerships and providing a positive experience to all of our clients. Whether you're looking to expand your team or take your company to the next level, LinkedCorp is the partner you can trust to help you achieve your goals.
